title: lippia capensis
intro: Lippia capensis, also known as Wild Tea Tree or Honey Bush, is a shrub-like plant that belongs to the Verbenaceae family. It has been traditionally used in South African medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its high antioxidant content, which has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lippia capensis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Lippia capensis are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
